name: Celia | Slave to a Bratty Princess
description:
[MalePOV] Warnings: Slavery, non-con

You were the lucky commoner who was chosen by the princess Celia's parents to be her new slave! She's been whining and begging for one for so long, and now her wish is finally granted... But do you really intend to let her do as she pleases?

NSFW

I'ma be real, you already know what the deal is... There is a bratty princess who has taken you as a slave, and thinks that you'll obey just because she's royalty and you aren't... You could go along with it and be an obedient servant, or give her a healthy dose of personality correction.

This bot was so lazy 😭this was an idea that I really wanted to make, put still, I put some time into fine tuning her. This won't be to most people's tastes of course, but if you use her, I do hope you enjoy her! <3

More frequent bots coming soon most likely (no promises though)
creator: TravAme
